Dockerfile.general_idea: Add a healthcheck script and configuration to monitor container health.
Dockerfile.after:
COPY healthcheck.sh /app/healthcheck.sh
RUN chmod +x /app/healthcheck.sh
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=5s --start-period=15s --retries=3 \
  CMD /app/healthcheck.sh

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Boot parent version from 3.5.4 to 3.5.5.
Rename the project artifact and name from 'webscraper' to 'quizme'.
Remove unused property definitions for jsoup, sqlite, pdfbox, openhtmltopdf, and openpdf.
Remove the custom repository definition for openhtmltopdf snapshots.
Add spring-boot-starter-actuator dependency for production monitoring.
Exclude Tomcat from spring-boot-starter-web to switch to Undertow.
Add spring-boot-starter-undertow dependency to replace Tomcat.
Replace spring-boot-starter-data-jpa with spring-boot-starter-data-mongodb.
Remove hibernate-community-dialects dependency as JPA is removed.
Remove sqlite-jdbc dependency as SQLite is no longer used.
Add commons-lang3 utility library.
Remove jsoup dependency as web scraping functionality is removed.
Add spring-boot-starter-security for authentication and authorization.
Remove pdfbox dependency as PDF generation is removed.
Add spring-boot-starter-oauth2-client for OAuth2 login support.
Remove openhtmltopdf-pdfbox dependency as PDF generation is removed.
Remove openhtmltopdf-slf4j dependency as PDF generation is removed.
Remove openpdf dependency as PDF generation is removed.
Add Lombok dependency for boilerplate reduction.
Add H2 database dependency for testing purposes.
Configure spring-boot-maven-plugin to produce executable JARs.
Add maven-resources-plugin configuration for UTF-8 encoding.
Add Azure WebApp Maven plugin for deployment configuration.
Add Maven profiles for dev, prod, slim, and legacy production builds.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Rename the Spring Boot application from 'webscraper' to 'quizme' to reflect the new project identity.
Add explicit active profile configuration for development environment.
Migrate database configuration from SQLite to H2 in-memory database.
src/main/resources/application.yml.after:
url: jdbc:h2:mem:quizme
username: sa
password:
driverClassName: org.h2.Driver

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Enable H2 console for database inspection during development.
Update JPA dialect from SQLite to H2 to match the new database driver.
Remove redundant Hibernate properties that are now handled by the dialect or default settings.
Remove explicit SQL init mode configuration, relying on defaults or DDL auto.
Remove explicit Thymeleaf configuration, relying on Spring Boot defaults.
src/main/resources/application.yml.before:
thymeleaf:
    cache: false
    prefix: classpath:/templates/
    suffix: .html

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Remove explicit static resource location configuration, relying on Spring Boot defaults.
src/main/resources/application.yml.before:
web:
    resources:
      static-locations: classpath:/static/
      cache:
        period: 0

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Configure Spring Security OAuth2 client for Google authentication.
src/main/resources/application.yml.after:
security:
    oauth2:
      client:
        registration:
          google:
            client-id: ${GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID}
            client-secret: ${GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET}
            scope:
              - email
              - profile
        provider:
          google:
            authorization-uri: https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/auth
            token-uri: https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token
            user-info-uri: https://www.googleapis.com/oauth2/v3/userinfo
            jwk-set-uri: https://www.googleapis.com/oauth2/v3/certs
            user-name-attribute: sub

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Simplify Spring DevTools configuration by removing explicit restart paths and remote settings.
src/main/resources/application.yml.before:
devtools:
    restart:
      enabled: true
      additional-paths: 
        - src/main/resources
        - src/main/java
      poll-interval: 1000
      quiet-period: 400
    livereload:
      enabled: true
      port: 35729
    remote:
      secret: mysecret
src/main/resources/application.yml.after:
devtools:
    restart:
      enabled: true
    livereload:
      enabled: true

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Configure server port to use environment variable with fallback, enabling HTTP/2.
Configure servlet encoding to force UTF-8.
src/main/resources/application.yml.after:
servlet:
    encoding:
      charset: UTF-8
      enabled: true
      force: true

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Configure Undertow server properties for performance optimization.
src/main/resources/application.yml.after:
undertow:
    threads:
      worker: 4
      io: 2
    buffer-size: 1024
    direct-buffers: true
    accesslog:
      enabled: false
    options:
      server:
        RECORD_REQUEST_START_TIME: false
      socket:
        BACKLOG: 1024

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Configure logging levels and patterns for various components including MongoDB, Hibernate, and Spring Security.
src/main/resources/application.yml.after:
logging:
  level:
    org.springframework.data.mongodb.core: INFO
    org.mongodb.driver: WARN
    org.hibernate.SQL: WARN
    org.hibernate.type.descriptor.sql.BasicBinder: WARN
    org.springframework: WARN
    org.apache.catalina: WARN
    org.eclipse.jetty: WARN
    org.springframework.security: DEBUG
  pattern:
    console: "%d{yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} - %msg%n"
    file: "%d{yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} [%thread] %-5level %logger{36} - %msg%n"

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Add custom application property to disable security features temporarily.

src/main/resources/templates/quiz-play.h.general_idea: Migrate from inline Tailwind CDN configuration to a shared Thymeleaf layout fragment.
Remove inline JavaScript logic and move data injection to global window variables for external script consumption.
src/main/resources/templates/quiz-play.h.before:
<script th:inline="javascript">
    const questions = /*[[${questions}]]*/ [];
    // ... inline functions loadQuestion, submitAnswer, etc. ...
</script>
src/main/resources/templates/quiz-play.h.after:
<script th:inline="javascript">
    /*<![CDATA[*/
    try {
        window.quizQuestionsData = /*[[${questions}]]*/[];
        window.quizTitle = /*[[${currentTitle}]]*/ null;
        // ...
    } catch (error) { ... }
    /*]]>*/
</script>
<script th:src="@{/js/breadcrumb-truncation.js}" defer></script>

src/main/resources/templates/titles.html.general_idea: Migrate the page structure to use a shared Thymeleaf layout fragment for consistent header/footer inclusion.
Replace inline Tailwind CSS configuration and CDN script with a standard CSS framework integration (likely Flowbite/Tailwind via build step).
Redesign the quiz title cards to use a modern grid layout with dark mode support and improved typography.
src/main/resources/templates/titles.html.before: <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">...<div class="bg-white rounded-3xl border-4 border-black shadow-paper">...
src/main/resources/templates/titles.html.after: <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6">...<div class="group bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 rounded-xl...">...

src/main/resources/templates/titles.html.general_idea: Update the data model binding in Thymeleaf to use 'titles' instead of 'quizzes' and access properties directly.
Add multilingual support attributes to static text elements for internationalization.
Implement an empty state view when no quizzes are available, including a back navigation link.
Add a sticky footer with a back button for better mobile navigation experience.
Separate JavaScript logic into external files with conditional loading for production (minified) vs development.
